full_text:
Zhu Yi (Jiwen) 朱異 (季文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Yi (朱異), styledJiwen (季文). A pivotal general of Wu and the son of Zhu Huan. Executed cruelly by Sun Chen for numerous defeats. Zhu Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhu Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
